title: Note accusant réception de l'approbation française et transmettant l'instrument maltais

pages.text:
CRA 1399/66

MINISTRY OF COMMONWEALTH

AND FOREIGN AFFAIRS

The Old Chancellery,

Palace Square,

Valletta, MALTA.

400L3.5.62

ENREGISTREMENT 5.55

The Ministry of Commonwealth and Foreign

Affairs presents its compliments to the Embassy of

Prance and has the honour to acknowledge the receipt of Embassy's Note Verbale No. 252 of 16th April, 1968 and of a communication from the Government of France notifying the Government of Malta that the procedures required for the coming into force of the Cultural

Agreement between Malta and France signed at Paris on 14th February, 1968, have been complied with.

The Ministry wishes to inform the ambassy

that the Government of Malta has also complied with the constitutional prescriptions in force in Malta for the conclusion and entering into force of international Agreements, and with reference to article

XV of the aforesaid Agreement has the honour to attach hereto the relative instrument of ratification.

The Ministry of Commonwealth and Foreign

Affairs avails itself of this opportunity to renew to the Embassy of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

30 April, 1968

MALTA

Embassy oi trance,

Ta' Xbiex.
